articles.title: 1 killed, 2 wounded in Greater Grand Crossing shooting
articles.description:
A man was killed and two others wounded in a shooting Friday in Greater Grand Crossing.

The victims were outside about noon in the 300 block of West 75th Street when multiple people got out of a sedan and opened fire, Chicago police said.

A 31-year-old man was shot multiple times and pronounced dead at St. Bernard Hospital, police said.

Two other men, ages 40 and 48, were shot in the side and leg, respectively. The younger man was taken to St. Bernard Hospital, and the other man taken to Advocate Christ Medical Center in Oak Lawn. Both were listed in serious condition, police said.

No arrests were reported.

articles.title: EXCLUSIVE: CBP Officers Seize $4 Million in Cocaine at San Diego Port
articles.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) officers at the San Ysidro Port of Entry recently found and seized more than 225 pounds of cocaine in a single smuggling event. The late-April seizure demonstrates the agency’s ability to focus on defeating cartel smuggling networks that continue to probe the heightened Trump border security posture for weaknesses. The post EXCLUSIVE: CBP Officers Seize $4 Million in Cocaine at San Diego Port appeared first on Breitbart .
